response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work in recent roles, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, and a demonstrated software-craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks). Java exposure covers the secondary stack. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, no Kotlin, and cloud experience appears AWS/Kubernetes-adjacent rather than deep, but the overall profile maps very well to the role.
strengths: Strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack experience, including AWS and MongoDB in production
Current AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of test libraries, ran testing workshops and courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned, though adjacent frameworks are covered
No Kotlin experience; Java exposure is dated (robotics work in 2016-2018)
Significant time invested in D language ecosystem, less directly relevant to the primary stack
